text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One afternoon, while I'm taking a<n>break at the
racetrack...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So a younger Umamusume came up<n>to me very
seriously and asked me<n>for some advice on how
to run faster.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It would've been easy-peasy,<n>lemon-squeezy if
all she wanted was<n>an instinct-based approach,
but she<n>actually wanted logic-based<n>
information.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not a trainer... I get the feeling<n>that giving
that sort of advice would be<n>pretty bogus, ya
know? Like that's<n>mad irresponsible.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But since she mustered up the<n>courage to ask
for my advice, I want<n>to help her the best I can.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I figured I'd ask you<n>what kinda
advice you would've<n>given her since you're a
pro and all.
choice_data_list: Teach her how to use her knees properly.
Work on improving her baseline endurance.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, I dig! So it's all in the knees! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're right. How you use the power<n>in your
knees is really important,<n>especially in the
beginning!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wicked. It's all coming to me now.<n>Now that's
the bomb-dot-com!<n>Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky spends the rest of the<n>day
passionately teaching the younger<n>Umamusume
on the other side of the<n>track.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're right. It all boils down to how<n>much
energy she's got in the first<n>place. That might be
where her<n>problem lies.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I think I can give her some good<n>advice
now! Rock on! Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky spends the rest of the<n>day helping
the younger Umamusume<n>train on the other side
of the track.
